definitions.name: avg_charges
definitions.business_description: Average of Total charges for the encounter

definitions.name: filter:having:unknown
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where COUNT(*) is at least 10

definitions.name: filter:having:PAT_ENC_HSP.TOTAL_CHARGES
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where AVG(pat_enc_hsp.total_charges) is greater than 5000
